Description:
Ballistics of the WB130P HEAT round fired from the 82mm Type 65, later designated as PW65 (炮无65), and Type 65-1 recoilless rifle. This is a domestic development and is not a copy of the B-10. Form factor in relation to 1943 drag curve i_43=2.2, penetrates 120mm/65°.

Projectile weighs 2.81 kg, loads 0.53 kg of double-base, strip type 42-5x150, develops 247 m/s from a maximum breech (lock) pressure of 315 kgf/cm^2. Chamber volume is 3 L, projectile travels 10.2 dm, chamber measures 1.94 dm in length, the chamber measures 1.226 dm^2 at the rear, throat area is 0.3968 dm^2, barrel cross section is 0.5281 dm^2. Projectile starts at 50 kgf/cm^2.

All pressure values treated as copper-crusher gauge, and converted accordingly. Expansion ratio and nozzle efficiency fitted to yield throat diameter matching reference, assuming complete recoilless conditions, as no concrete information is known.

References:
- 《火炸药手册 第二分册 固体火箭推进剂和枪炮发射药》第五机械工业部第二零四研究所，1981
- 《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
- 《炮弹火箭手册》兵器工业部第三管理局，1984
- 《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
